_comment: Remote bot hosts managed from the Bots page, IN ADDITION to the implicit 'local' host (this server, which uses TWITCHBOT_DIR / the default /root/twitchbot). Copy this file to config/botHosts.json (gitignored) and edit. Each host runs its file + docker operations over SSH, so the server must be able to SSH to host.ssh.target non-interactively (key-based, BatchMode). You can also supply the same JSON via the BOT_HOSTS env var instead of a file.
